_note: Demo seed for BIRK Commodities A/S. Update hedge rates and value_dates annually to keep the story current. To trigger MC risk on the BRL position, ensure BRL/USD spot is below the hedge rate (0.194).
_story: 7 exposures, ~EUR 41M portfolio. Mix of HEDGED / IN PROGRESS / OPEN. BRL/USD payable hedged above current spot → margin call risk shows on Dashboard. USD/NOK open → calls out the recommendation engine.
_refresh_dates: Update value_dates and end_dates each year — they should always be 3-9 months in the future to look live.

exposures.description: European wheat procurement — Q3/Q4 delivery, Amsterdam port
exposures._story: 64% hedged — IN PROGRESS. Two tranches below budget (good lock-in), one above. Clear story: proactive hedging, room to add.

tranches.notes: DNB Markets — fwd ref DNB-WH-240312-01. Locked before EUR strengthened.
DNB Markets — fwd ref DNB-WH-240318-02. Added on rate dip.
SEB Corporate Banking — opportunistic hedge, best rate to date.

exposures.description: UK shipping and logistics partners — Q2 invoices, Dover/Felixstowe
exposures._story: 94% hedged → HEDGED status. Policy target met. Two tranches — mixed but overall near budget.

tranches.notes: Nordea Treasury — Q2 logistics forward, below budget rate.
Nordea Treasury — topped up hedging when GBP strengthened briefly.

exposures.description: US grain export proceeds — July settlement, Houston port
exposures._story: 0% hedged → OPEN. Unprotected USD receivable. Recommendation engine will flag this. Good demo moment: click Hedging → USD/NOK to show the recommendation.

exposures.description: Japanese steel billet imports — rolling monthly, Yokohama port
exposures._story: 42% hedged — IN PROGRESS. Single large tranche. JPY is historically volatile so partial hedge is defensible. Shows the diversification of BIRK's exposure book.

tranches.notes: DNB Markets — JPY/USD partial hedge, ref DNB-JP-240305-01.

exposures.description: Oslo HQ operational costs — EUR-denominated supplier invoices H1 2026
exposures._story: 56% hedged — IN PROGRESS. NOK/EUR is BIRK's home-currency pair. Two tranches placed at slightly different rates. Shows active treasury management.

tranches.notes: SEB Corporate Banking — H1 opex hedge tranche 1.
SEB Corporate Banking — H1 opex hedge tranche 2, topped up.

exposures.description: London office — annual lease renewal and local payroll Q3-Q4 2026
exposures._story: 100% hedged → HEDGED status. Fully protected. Good example of complete hedge execution. Two tranches split across Q3 and Q4.

tranches.notes: Nordea Treasury — London office Q3 costs fully hedged.
Nordea Treasury — London office Q4 costs fully hedged.

exposures.description: Brazilian soybean imports — Paranaguá port, multiple shipments Q2-Q3
exposures._story: 43% hedged — IN PROGRESS. CRITICAL: hedge rates (0.194, 0.196) are above current BRL/USD spot (~0.185), making these forwards OFFSIDE. MTM loss triggers margin call risk alert on Dashboard. Good demo moment: show the MC banner, explain why it matters.

tranches.notes: DNB Markets — BRL/USD forward ref DNB-BR-240228-01. Hedged when BRL was stronger.
DNB Markets — second tranche, BRL continued to strengthen at time of execution.
